---
title: 'Welcome | Bienvenido'
date: '2019-06-23T19:30:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'El Amor de Calvario'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6274548107967380142'
blogger_filename: '/p/welcome.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/El Amor de Calvario/feed.atom'
---

<h2>
Welcome</h2>
<div>
We are El Amor de Calvario (Love of Calvary), a bilingual church in Ottis Orchards, Washington (located between Spokane, WA / Coeur d'Alene ID).<br />
<br />
We share the love of Jesus Christ in English and Spanish every Sunday morning at 10:30 am PST.<br />
<br />
We look forward to seeing you!<br />
<br />
With Love, Pastor Ray and Bertha Duran<br />
<br />
<div style="text-align: center;">
***</div>
<br />
<h2>
Bienvenido&nbsp;</h2>
Somos El Amor de Calvario (Love of Calvary), una iglesia bilingÃ¼e en Ottis Orchards, Washington (ubicada entre Spokane, WA / Coeur d'Alene ID).</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div>
Compartimos el amor de Jesucristo en inglÃ©s y espaÃ±ol todos los domingos por la maÃ±ana a las 10:30 am PST.</div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div>
Â¡Esperamos verte!</div>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<div>
Con amor, el pastor Ray y Bertha Duran.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br /></div>
</div>
<div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-102251965-burst000-cover-top-f2df313838c3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1200" data-original-width="1600" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20190421-102251965-burst000-cover-top-a1ac59c48fa4.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br /></div>
